title: Y Property
description: Defines the Y position of a Point object.
notes:
The Y property is used to locate vertical position of the Point object.  This property is initially set to the Y position where the user drops a newly created Point object. However, if a Point object is associated with another object in the sequence (i.e. the PointType property is set to another vision object and not set to "Screen"), then the Y property for the Point object is automatically modified according to the associated property.

When the PointType property is set to "Screen", there are 2 methods which can be used to move the Point object:

Click the Point object's label and drag the object to the position you want to place it.
Type in X and Y Pixel Coordinate positions for the center of the Point object.  After you type in a value to the X property or Y property and move off that property the Point object will move to that new X or Y position.

There are cases where the user may want to position a Point object dynamically and for that reason the Y property can also be set from the SPEL+ Language.
